Title: Test creating a new PostComment
Preconditions: A user is logged in and has a valid post.
Test Data:
- Post ID: 1
  - Author: John Doe
  - Content: "This is a test comment."
Test Steps:
1. Log in as a user.
  2. Navigate to the post with ID 1.
  3. Click the "Add Comment" button.
  4. Enter the author as "John Doe".
  5. Enter the content as "This is a test comment.".
  6. Click the "Submit" button.
Expected Result: A new PostComment is created with the provided author and content.

Title: Test creating a PostComment with empty content
Preconditions: A user is logged in and has a valid post.
Test Data:
- Post ID: 1
  - Author: John Doe
  - Content: ""
Test Steps:
1. Log in as a user.
  2. Navigate to the post with ID 1.
  3. Click the "Add Comment" button.
  4. Enter the author as "John Doe".
  5. Enter the content as an empty string.
  6. Click the "Submit" button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the PostComment is not created.
